result.stdout:
OpenApi MediatR Response Matcher
===================================

A tool to detect mismatches between controller action return types and MediatR handler response types.

Usage:
  OpenApiMediatRResponseMatcher [options]

Options:
  -h, --help                    Show this help message
  -p, --project <path>          Path to the project root (default: current directory)
  -c, --controllers <path>      Path to controllers directory (auto-detected if not specified)
  -d, --handlers <path>         Path to handlers directory (auto-detected if not specified)
  -m, --mismatches-only         Show only mismatches (hide correct matches)
  -e, --executor <pattern>      Add custom MediatR executor method name (e.g., "ProcessCommand")

Examples:

  # Analyze current directory
  dotnet run

  # Analyze specific project
  dotnet run -- --project "/path/to/project"

  # Specify custom paths
  dotnet run -- --controllers "src/Api" --handlers "src/Application"

  # Show only mismatches
  dotnet run -- --mismatches-only

  # Add custom executor pattern
  dotnet run -- --executor "ProcessCommand" --executor "HandleQuery"
